contactId.title: Contact ID
contactId.description: The ID of the Contact record.
contactId.einstein:description: The ID of the Contact record.

endTime.title: End Time
endTime.description:
The end of the time range for retrieving the service appointments. If there's no given end time, only the start time is used. The time must be in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:SS.
            For example: 2025-11-16 17:00:00.
endTime.einstein:description:
The end of the time range for retrieving the service appointments. If there's no given end time, only the start time is used. The time must be in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:SS.
For example: 2025-11-16 17:00:00.

startTime.title: Start Time
startTime.description:
The start of the time range for retrieving the service appointments. The default value is today. The time must be in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:SS.
            For example: 2025-11-15 17:00:00.
startTime.einstein:description:
The start of the time range for retrieving the service appointments. The default value is today. The time must be in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:SS
.For example: 2025-11-15 17:00:00.

operationType.title: Operation Type
operationType.description: Defines the type of operation. For future use only.
operationType.einstein:description: Defines the type of operation. For future use only.
